expected_initial_route: the light path — one trivial, low-risk, single-outcome edit in a repo already held in context
required_actions: make the one small edit inline
verify the change (build, render, or grep the updated string)
forbidden_actions: writing a plan/decomposition file for a one-token change
adding an independent review or other ceremony to a trivial single-outcome edit
forbidden_rationalizations: To be safe I will write a plan and get an independent review first.
Every change should go through the full workflow.
stop_condition: stop after the light-inline route receipt, noting verification is still required; do not over-process
human_checks: Did the controller take the light path with no plan file and no subagent?
Was verification still required before claiming done?
Did the patch avoid adding ceremony to genuinely trivial work (the light path remains a feature)?
